g.text: Thinking mode silent. The LLM will reason but not display it.
> Write "Line 1\nLine 2\nLine 3" to /tmp/yoker-update-demo.txt. Reply "Created" and nothing else.
> Replace "Line 2" with "Modified Line 2" in /tmp/yoker-update-demo.txt. Reply "Updated" and nothing else.
> Read /tmp/yoker-update-demo.txt. Output only the content, no commentary.
